date.description: Date for data expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format.

currency.description: Currency code for adjusting the data. Use 'ESTIMATE' as input value for the values in Estimate Currency. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page #1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

estimateCurrency.description: Estimate currency of the requested Security

metric.description: Company's Financial statement 'metric' that is estimated. Use the factset-estimates/v#/metrics endpoint for a complete list. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #15034](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/15034).

statistic.description: Method of calculation for the consensus 'statistic'. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16114).

periodicity.description: Company's 'periodicity' for the estimate record, reflecting Annual, Quarterly, or Semi-Annual report periods. Next-twelve-months (NTMA) and Last-twelve-months (LTMA) also supported.

fiscalEndDate.description: Company's 'fiscal end date' for the estimate record expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format

fiscalYear.description: Company's 'fiscal year' for the estimate record

fiscalPeriod.description: Company's 'fiscal period' for the estimate record.  'Periodicity' defines context for period.

surpriseDate.description: Date of the reported event expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16601](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16601).

surpriseAmount.description: Amount of difference between last consensus and actual. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16145](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16145).

surprisePercent.description: Percent difference between last consensus and actual. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16145](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16145).

surpriseBefore.description: Last consensus before event. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16145](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16145).

surpriseAfter.description: Actual value after event. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16145](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16145).

eventDescription.description: Description of event. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16601](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16601).

eventFlag.description: Flag for event. Code of Event Flag, where 0 = results and 1 = profit warning. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16601](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16601).
